regions.name: Perrow
regions.description: A run-down town under the iron grip of the Liziti, sprawling from a crumbling cemetery in the hills down to the docks at the river's edge.

regions.name: Argentiara
regions.description: A silver-mining town hacked into the foothills, its streets grey with rock dust and its fortunes bound to the seams that thread the mountain below.

regions.name: Bortellini
regions.description: A grand river city of races and spectacle, its amphitheatre and hippodrome drawing crowds along the banks of the tidal river.

regions.name: Alamone
regions.description: A maze of druidic islands threaded by floating markets and shadowed back-channels, where commerce and secrets drift between the verdant islets.
